About

I'm Brooke — a graphic designer & content creator based in St. Pete, Florida. I make TikToks about home, space, and the art of everyday living: the spaces I build, the places I love, and the aesthetic I live by.

Why Partner With Me

"My audience comes for the aesthetic and stays for the realness. I create content that feels like a lifestyle and not just an ad. When I bring a brand into my space, it belongs there. My viewers trust my eye, my taste, and my recommendations because everything I share is something I'd actually live with."

What I Offer
Dedicated Video
A full TikTok video centered around your product or brand, styled naturally within my space and aesthetic.
Brand Integration
Your product featured organically within my regular content — seamless and authentic to my audience.
Link in Bio
Featured placement in my bio driving traffic directly to your site or landing page.
Multi-Video Package
A series of videos across a campaign window for sustained brand presence and authentic storytelling.
